DEMURRER
Off Calendar Feb-14-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: There being no appearances and no opposition on file, the tentative ruling was adopted as the order of the court. As to causes of action of Avalon Tower's demurrer to complaint five for false advertising, six for unfair business practices, seven for intentional misrepresentation, and eight for negligent misrepresentation the demurrer is sustained with 10 days leave to amend. (JJM/CL) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
